title: 幸せ、いただきます――オグリキャップ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap! Snap, snap, snap! Snap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come to the cafeteria one day to find a crowd of
students pointing their cameras at Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa, WHOA!
What's with all the hubbub?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh. It's just Oguri eating a mountain of food, like
always!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What's with all the people, then?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let me introduce you, Bamboo. This is the "Watch
Oguri Eat" meetup group.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The... what?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They, uh...
What do you all do again?

text_block_list.name: Meetup Member A
text_block_list.text:
So there's this rumor going around school right
now.

text_block_list.name: Meetup Member A
text_block_list.text:
They say that if you set a picture of Oguri eating
as your phone background, you'll be able to lose
weight!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Meetup Member B
text_block_list.text:
It began when a student nailed her weight-loss
target, even though she ate a bunch. Word got
around that it was because Oguri helped her.

text_block_list.name: Meetup Member B
text_block_list.text:
One thing led to another, and now people say
you'll lose weight if you have Oguri eating as your
background!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so you all just wanna... Hey, wait a minute!
Wouldn't it be faster to just run a whole lot?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And are you okay with all this, Oguri? It's like
you're on exhibition here!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If it makes everyone happy to watch me eat, then
I'm happy too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. So I'm fine with it. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Just what?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I like eating. But I like it way more when I'm
eating with others.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I think I'd be happier if everyone else was eating
with me...

text_block_list.name: Meetup Members
text_block_list.text: Swoon!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh! You... You're like some kinda
pure-hearted angel!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Count me in, boss! I'll be right back with
a plate and chopsticks!

text_block_list.name: Meetup Members
text_block_list.text:
Let's all get some plates too!
We'll start dieting tomorrow! One hundred
percent, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... You're all going to join me?
I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay...
Everyone, let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo and Everyone Else
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I thought you guys were tryin' to lose weight! Good luck runnin' all that off!
